title: Definition
doc_html:
SECTION 2.  SUBROGATION

Art. 1825.  Definition

Subrogation is the substitution of one person to the rights of another.  It may be conventional or legal.

Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.

SECTION 2.  SUBROGATION
Art. 1825.  Definition
Subrogation is the substitution of one person to the rights of another.  It may be conventional or legal.
Acts 1984, No. 331, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1985.
